name: Crockpot Italian Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 boneless skinless chicken breast halves (4 to 16 ounces)
salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the crockpot.
2. Cook on low for 8-10 hours.
3. Serve over rice.
4. Makes a good meal after a long day.
Note: I have also varied this recipe using beef or pork. You can also add other vegetables, such as zucchini, green beans, or peas, depending on what's available in the fridge.
